name: Cheese and Vegetable Quiche
recipeIngredient: 10 oz Package frozen chopped broccoli, thawed and well drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Place cottage cheese in container of an electric blender or food processor. Top with cover and process until smooth.
2. Add egg substitute, milk, basil, and pepper; process until smooth. Set aside.
3. Pour olive oil into a large nonstick skillet. Heat over medium heat until hot.
4. Add potatoes and green onions to the skillet. Cook for 10 minutes or until vegetables are tender.
5. Add broccoli and red pepper to the skillet. Cook for an additional 4 minutes, or until vegetables are crisp-tender.
6. Place the vegetable mixture in a 10-inch quiche dish that has been coated with cooking spray.
7. Pour egg substitute mixture over the vegetables.
8. Bake at 350°F for 50 minutes, or until set. Let stand 10 minutes before slicing into wedges.
